title: Rough Gems
description: Gems are now rough and have to be processed on the grindstone. Overgeared is necessary for this mod to run.
body: Makes so both diamond and redstone are rough gems and have to be processed to be used. I will add more uses for just the rough gems itselves on the near future on other mods. All ores now also drop cobblestone or cobbled deepslate, I will add compatibility for other ores in the near future.
